headline20: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 24 airports right now.
management45: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 24 airports right now. Engine anti-ice operations are flagged at Iaşi (IAS/LRIA), Craiova (CRA/LRCV). Across base airports: 4 critical, 18 high, 9 medium, 8 normal. Key bases needing attention include Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR), Chişinău (RMO/LUKK) and Iaşi (IAS/LRIA); plus 19 other bases. 9 additional base airports are at medium severity and should be monitored closely. At base airports, the dominant pattern is snow-related runway contamination risk, mist and fog / freezing fog  — most notably around Iaşi (IAS/LRIA), Craiova (CRA/LRCV) and Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD). Network hotspots: Iaşi (IAS/LRIA), Craiova (CRA/LRCV), Bologna Guglielmo Marconi (BLQ/LIPE), Košice (KSC/LZKZ), Copenhagen Kastrup (CPH/EKCH) and 19 others. Primary drivers: low cloud base, snow / blowing snow and very low visibility. Expected impact is reduced runway capacity with higher delay and diversion risk, especially where visibility/RVR and cloud base are very low. Since the last update, 12 airports changed status, led by Iaşi (IAS/LRIA), Craiova (CRA/LRCV), Bologna Guglielmo Marconi (BLQ/LIPE) and 9 others.
detail90: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 24 airports right now. Base airports (focus): Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR) — HIGH: mist; cloud base around 500 ft | Chişinău (RMO/LUKK) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 800 m, cloud base around 400 ft | Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) — CRIT: freezing fog; freezing precipitation / icing risk; cold-temperature performance penalties | Tirana International Airport Mother Teresa (TIA/LATI) — HIGH: mist | Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP) — HIGH: freezing fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 600 m, cloud base around 200 ft | Rome–Fiumicino Leonardo da Vinci (FCO/LIRF) — HIGH: thunderstorm / convective risk and 16 others. Worst affected now: Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) — CRIT: freezing fog; freezing precipitation / icing risk; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: engine anti-ice operations, low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints) | Craiova (CRA/LRCV) — CRIT: freezing fog; freezing precipitation / icing risk; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: engine anti-ice operations, low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints) | Bologna Guglielmo Marconi (BLQ/LIPE) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 50 m, RVR down to 350 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Košice (KSC/LZKZ) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 100 m, RVR down to 500 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), low-visibility takeoff restrictions, runway visual range (RVR) constraints) | Copenhagen Kastrup (CPH/EKCH) — CRIT: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 1.2 km, cloud base around 500 ft (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, snow/blowing snow) | Malmö Sturup (MMX/ESMS) — CRIT: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 1.2 km, cloud base around 500 ft (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, snow/blowing snow) and 18 others. Changed since last run: Iaşi (IAS/LRIA), Craiova (CRA/LRCV), Bologna Guglielmo Marconi (BLQ/LIPE), Košice (KSC/LZKZ), Malmö Sturup (MMX/ESMS), Josep Tarradellas Barcelona-El Prat (BCN/LEBL), Bordeaux–Mérignac (BOD/LFBD), Paris-Orly (ORY/LFPO), Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB), Hamburg Helmut Schmidt (HAM/EDDH) and 2 others.
